docket_entries.description: PER STIPULATION. IF PARTIES HAVE SETTLED, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 8/5/99 AT 3:30 PM & THE COURT WILL DISMISS ACTION W/ PREJUDICE.
